name: Environmental Health Web Support Assistant
description: Resident-facing web chat assistant for environmental health queries. Helps residents report noise complaints, request pest control, raise food hygiene concerns, and understand environmental nuisance processes.

llm.notes: Tested on gpt-4o-mini at temperature 0.1. Consistency is important — residents must receive accurate and consistent guidance on what constitutes a statutory nuisance and when to call rather than use the online form.

environment_variables.description: Your OpenAI API key. Set under Credentials in Flowise and assign to the agent node.

vector_store.description: Council environmental health service pages, noise complaint process, pest control service details, food hygiene inspection process, smoke control zone information, air quality data, statutory nuisance guidance, and HSE signposting information.

inputs.name: resident_query
inputs.description: The resident's question or message, entered via the embedded web chat widget.

outputs.name: assistant_response
outputs.description: A plain-English response answering the resident's query, signposting to a reporting form or contact, or escalating to a human contact or external body.

flow_state.description: Your council's full name. Used throughout responses.
Your council's main website URL. Used when redirecting out-of-scope queries.
The URL of the council's environmental health web pages.
The environmental health team contact number. Include an out-of-hours noise line where available — out-of-hours noise complaints are a common escalation trigger for this flow.
The environmental health team email address.

governance.human_review_notes: No human review required for individual responses. Monitor conversation logs monthly for patterns indicating recurring service issues — repeated noise complaints in one area or food hygiene concerns about a specific business may warrant proactive action by the environmental health team. Flag any conversations where a serious food hygiene or public health concern may not have been escalated appropriately.
governance.data_notes: Residents may share their address when reporting issues. The assistant must not encourage residents to share personal information about neighbours beyond what is necessary to describe the nuisance. Session memory clears when the conversation ends.
